## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps for marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance for new articles is promising, with 42% of impressions in the last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Decision to remove dates from articles to avoid appearing AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Plan to cross-publish articles on LinkedIn and coordinate with Amanda for social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Expanding content focus to include food & beverage, renewable fuels, and other industrial applications](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [New articles (/article URLs) represent 42% of all impressions in the last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Average position starts at 33 (5th page in Google search)](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Overall website CTR: 2.2%, article CTR lower due to ranking growth](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Prognosis is positive; rankings expected to improve over 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Decision to remove dates from articles to avoid AI-generated appearance](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Plan to cross-publish articles on LinkedIn:](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Repurpose 1 article into 3 LinkedIn entries (full link, text-only, creative adaptation)](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Coordinate with Amanda for social media calendar and event hashtags](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Top-performing keywords: manufacturing analytics, MINT-related, sustainability](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Successful industry-specific articles: gold refining, lithium processing, copper processing](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Expanding Content Focus

  - [Explore content for sugar beet plants and sugar-ethanol industry](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Consider general food & beverage thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Potential topics: edible oils, food ingredients, tomato processing](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Target companies: Cargill, Louis Dreyfus Company (LDC), Unilever](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Investigate AI applications in food consistency (e.g., Heinz tomato sauce)](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Explore content on cosmetics and personal care products](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [7 articles published last week](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [7 new articles planned for the current week, including:](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Industrial AI series (cement manufacturing, energy management)](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
      - [Polymer-related content](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [Sustainability and energy management focus](https://fathom.video/share/XoDzXZDkte1x6SFEy3DW1TyMdeRJ5SsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
